full_text_source: papers\pdfs\2023 - Unsupervised Deep Learning of Sparse Signals against Low-Rank Backgrounds with Application to Online.pdf
notes: Focuses on lung adventitious sound extraction rather than heart-lung cardiopulmonary separation; dataset details and standard source separation metrics are limited. Year eligibility: within 2022-2026 review range.

full_text_source: papers\pdfs\Ali et al. - 2023 - An End-to-End Deep Learning Framework for Real-Time Denoising of Heart Sounds for Cardiac Disease De.pdf
notes: Primary goal is heart sound denoising and cardiac disease detection, not separation into both heart and lung outputs. Year eligibility: within 2022-2026 review range.

full_text_source: papers\pdfs\Ansari et al. - 2023 - A Robust Hybrid Neural Network Architecture for Blind Source Separation of Speech Signals Exploiting.pdf
notes: Not biomedical or cardiopulmonary; relevance is limited to generic audio separation concepts. Year eligibility: within 2022-2026 review range.

full_text_source: papers\pdfs\Dutta and Gaikwad - 2025 - Multi-resolution Analysis Based Time-Domain Audio Source Separation with Optimized U-NET Model.pdf
notes: No biomedical, heart, lung, or cardiopulmonary data; method may be too generic for main Chapter 2 evidence. Year eligibility: within 2022-2026 review range.

full_text_source: papers\pdfs\Grooby et al. - 2023 - Noisy Neonatal Chest Sound Separation for High-Quality Heart and Lung Sounds.pdf
notes: Data are neonatal and not clearly public; NMF/NMCF may be slower and less robust under respiratory support noise than later deep models. Year eligibility: within 2022-2026 review range.

full_text_source: papers\pdfs\Jamal et al. - 2025 - Generative AI Respiratory and Cardiac Sound Separation Using Variational Autoencoders (VAEs).pdf
notes: Despite the title, the extracted conclusion emphasizes disease detection/classification rather than validated source separation outputs. Year eligibility: within 2022-2026 review range.

full_text_source: papers\pdfs\Muramatsu et al. - 2022 - Non-Contact Heart Sound Measurement Using Independent Component Analysis.pdf
notes: Heart sound extraction only; no lung output and no cardiopulmonary heart-lung separation. Year eligibility: within 2022-2026 review range.

full_text_source: papers\pdfs\Poh et al. - 2023 - Real-time Neonatal Chest Sound Separation using Deep Learning.pdf
notes: Duplicate/earlier version of the peer-reviewed 2024 NeoSSNet paper retained as P009. Year eligibility: within 2022-2026 review range.

full_text_source: papers\pdfs\Poh et al. - 2024 - NeoSSNet Real-Time Neonatal Chest Sound Separation Using Deep Learning.pdf
notes: Neonatal private/clinical data; performance limited by noisy/low-quality recordings and respiratory support noise. Year eligibility: within 2022-2026 review range.

full_text_source: papers\pdfs\Renna et al. - 2024 - Separation of the Aortic and Pulmonary Components of the Second Heart Sound via Alternating Optimiza.pdf
notes: Separates heart sound subcomponents, not heart and lung sounds; clinical PH analysis is outside FYP scope. Year eligibility: within 2022-2026 review range.

full_text_source: papers\pdfs\Roy et al. - 2024 - Recent Advances in PCG Signal Analysis using AI A Review.pdf
notes: Review is classification-focused and does not directly cover heart-lung separation as a main task. Year eligibility: within 2022-2026 review range.

full_text_source: papers\pdfs\Santoso et al. - 2025 - Streamlining heart failure patient care with machine learning of thoracic cavity sound data.pdf
notes: Disease management/classification review with no direct separation method or implementation evidence for heart-lung source separation. Year eligibility: within 2022-2026 review range.

full_text_source: papers\pdfs\Sun et al. - 2024 - Research on heart and lung sound separation method based on DAE–NMF–VMD.pdf
notes: Data/code availability is on request rather than clearly public; supervised-independent details may be harder to reproduce. Year eligibility: within 2022-2026 review range.

full_text_source: papers\pdfs\Tariq et al. - 2022 - Feature-Based Fusion Using CNN for Lung and Heart Sound Classification.pdf
notes: Classification-only; no heart-lung source separation output. Year eligibility: within 2022-2026 review range.

full_text_source: papers\pdfs\Ullah and Zhang - 2024 - Unsupervised framework for single channel heart and lung sounds separation in data constrained envir.pdf
notes: May be less aligned with neural model implementation than deep learning papers; dataset availability unclear. Year eligibility: within 2022-2026 review range.

full_text_source: papers\pdfs\Wang et al. - 2023 - A multi-channel UNet framework based on SNMF-DCNN for robust heart-lung-sound separation.pdf
notes: Dataset public availability unclear; may depend on simulated/constructed mixtures. Year eligibility: within 2022-2026 review range.

full_text_source: papers\pdfs\Wang et al. - 2023 - Heart-lung sound separation by nonnegative matrix factorization and deep learning.pdf
notes: Partly depends on heart sound type classification and constructed mixture assumptions; dataset availability unclear. Year eligibility: within 2022-2026 review range.

notes: Heart sound analysis review; not focused on heart-lung separation and partly clinical diagnosis oriented. Year eligibility: within 2022-2026 review range.
